text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 98 

PRVDR_ENT_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Provider Entity Type Code — individual, group or facility 

DESCRIPTION: A code to identify whether the SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID is assigned to an individual, a group of 
providers, or a facility; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENT_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENT_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APR base
